input_schema.description: A single cat picture to evaluate for the genuineness and authenticity of the cat's observed behavior.

output.$starlark: [x / sum(output) if sum(output) > 0 else 1.0 / len(output) for x in output]

input_merge.$starlark: [item for sublist in input for item in sublist]

description: Ranks cat pictures by unselfconscious charm, evaluating behavioral authenticity, emotional resonance, and spontaneous aliveness to surface images that capture genuine, unposed moments of cats being themselves over staged or contrived content.

input_schema.description: A collection of cat pictures to rank by unselfconscious charm.

items.description: A picture of a cat to evaluate for the naturalness and authenticity of the captured moment.
